title: Sandbox Session Lifecycle

class_summary.SandboxSession: Decorator/wrapper around BaseSandboxSession. Adds @instrumented_op audit events and SDK tracing spans. Holds _inner: BaseSandboxSession, _instrumentation: Instrumentation, _seq: int. Delegates all ops to _inner.
class_summary.BaseSandboxSession: Abstract base defining full lifecycle. Key state flags: _start_workspace_state_preserved, _start_system_state_preserved, _start_workspace_root_ready. Concurrency: _max_manifest_entry_concurrency, _max_local_dir_file_concurrency.
class_summary.SandboxSessionState: Pydantic model: session_id (UUID), snapshot (SnapshotBase), manifest (Manifest), workspace_root_ready (bool), snapshot_fingerprint (str|None), exposed_ports (tuple[int,...]). Subclass registry via 'type' discriminator.
class_summary.Instrumentation: Holds sinks; emits SandboxSessionStartEvent / SandboxSessionFinishEvent. flush() on aclose.

startup: Caller → SandboxSession: start()  [or async with entry via __aenter__]
_probe: if workspace_state_preserved AND NOT workspace_root_ready → exec('test -d <workspace_root>', timeout=10s)
aclose_full_lifecycle: BaseSandboxSession.aclose() → run_pre_stop_hooks()  [user-registered async hooks, run-once guard]

concurrency_limits.usage: _max_manifest_entry_concurrency passed to ManifestApplier; _max_local_dir_file_concurrency used per LocalDir file staging

state_preservation_logic._start_workspace_state_preserved: Set by provider via _set_start_state_preserved(workspace=True). Signals workspace files from prior run may still exist.
state_preservation_logic._start_system_state_preserved: Set alongside workspace flag. Controls whether OS users/groups need re-provisioning.
state_preservation_logic._start_workspace_root_ready: Captures state.workspace_root_ready at start-time. Probed via exec test if preserved but not yet marked ready.
state_preservation_logic.reuse_decision: Reuse preserved workspace only if _start_workspace_state_preserved=True AND workspace_root_ready=True.

instrumentation_flow.@instrumented_op decorator: Wraps async method: calls _annotate(op, start_data, run, finish_data, ok, outputs)
instrumentation_flow._annotate: Opens custom_span if tracing active → emit StartEvent → await run() → emit FinishEvent(duration_ms, ok, stdout, stderr)
instrumentation_flow.events: SandboxSessionStartEvent + SandboxSessionFinishEvent (fields: session_id, seq, op, span_id, trace_id, data, ok, duration_ms, error_type, error_code)

key_relationships: BaseSandboxSession uses ManifestApplier for manifest materialization
BaseSandboxSession delegates to Dependencies for external resource lifecycle
important_notes: stop() is persistence-ONLY (snapshot). Resource teardown is in shutdown().
NoopSnapshot skips all snapshot persistence in _persist_snapshot.
_ensure_backend_started and _prepare_backend_workspace are provider hooks (default no-op) — overridden by e.g. Docker/Unix backends.
Concurrency limits flow: SandboxRunConfig → SandboxSession._set_concurrency_limits → BaseSandboxSession + ManifestApplier.
Snapshot fingerprint (sha256 of workspace tar) enables skip-restore optimization on preserved resume.
SandboxSession.aclose() calls super().aclose() first, then flushes instrumentation in finally block.
